case_title: WILLIAMS, LOUIS VS KRAGEN AUTO PARTS ABEL GUZMAN MGR.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, LOUIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KRAGEN AUTO PARTS ABEL GUZMAN MGR. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
